title: Supervised consumption sites and services - Canada.ca
content:
## Supervised consumption sites and services
Learn how  supervised consumption sites and services can help save lives. Find information  on how to apply to run a site, list of authorized sites, and where to find  services in your area.

## Services and information

### Supervised consumption sites and services explained
Learn about how these sites work, who they benefit and how they help save lives.

### Find a service: Interactive map
Use the map to find supervised consumption sites and services in communities across the country.
Find out what you need before you apply, download the application form, and what happens once your application is submitted.

### List of sites and services
List of authorized sites offering services and status of open applications
